calendar.description: Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing
Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing

general_provisions: This bill modifies certain sunset and repeal dates.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>extends the sunset dates for the following:<hr><ltbullet1>the State Weed Committee;<hr><ltbullet1>the Bears Ears Visitor Center Advisory Committee;<hr><ltbullet1>the Land Use and Eminent Domain Advisory Board;<hr><ltbullet1>the Rare Disease Advisory Council Grant Program;<hr><ltbullet1>the Newborn Hearing Screening Committee;<hr><ltbullet1>the Mobile Crisis Outreach Team Grant Program;<hr><ltbullet1>the Behavioral Health Receiving Center Grant Program;<hr><ltbullet1>the Child Care Advisory Committee;<hr><ltbullet1>the Health Care Providers Immunity from Liability Act;<hr><ltbullet1>the Behavior Analyst Licensing Act;<hr><ltbullet1>the Behavioral Health Crisis Response Committee and associated provisions;<hr><ltbullet1>the Utah Commission on Aging; and<hr><ltbullet1>the Alternative Dispute Resolution Act;<hr><ltbullet>removes the sunset date regarding lead acid battery disposal;<hr><ltbullet>extends the repeal date for the Rural Physician Loan Repayment Program Advisory Committee and provisions regarding the committee and program;<hr><ltbullet>makes technical changes regarding the State Weed Committee; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
